project_type: Node.js TypeScript monorepo - distributed task queue engine (Express server, worker process, React dashboard)
build_system: npm workspaces. Root package.json has workspaces: [shared, server, worker, dashboard]. Build order: shared -> server -> worker -> dashboard (sequential via root script).
test_framework: Vitest with ioredis-mock. 92 tests across 6 phase test files in tests/. No external services needed for tests.
verification_instructions: 1. Run npm run build and confirm exit code 0. 2. Run npm test and confirm 92 tests pass.
environment_constraints: INTEGRATIONS_ONLY network - cannot pull docker images, install packages from npm, or make external HTTP calls. Validation limited to AST checks (build/typecheck) on pre-installed node runtime. Docker build cannot be tested.
contribution_requirements: Keep all 92 existing tests passing. ESM modules with type: module. Follow existing patterns in monorepo.
key_patterns: Monorepo with shared types/utils re-exported from shared/src/index.ts. Server uses Express with buildRouter pattern. Worker is standalone process. Dashboard is Vite+React SPA. Config via environment variables per .env.example. Dev docker-compose.yml exists for Redis+Postgres.
directory_structure: shared/ - types, Redis keys, ioredis+pg factories, logger. server/ - Producer SDK, Express REST API, WebSocket, metrics, auth. worker/ - BLMOVE pull loop, handler registry, scheduler, janitor. dashboard/ - React+Vite+Tailwind SPA. tests/ - Vitest suite (6 phase files). examples/ - smoke.ts. infra/postgres/ - SQL migrations.
